title: alpinia fusiformis
intro: Alpinia fusiformis, also known as Lesser Galangal, is a type of ginger plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Alpinia fusiformis include reducing pain and inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, capsules, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
